2605.06317.title: NavOne: One-Step Global Planning for Vision-Language Navigation on Top-Down Maps
2605.06317.paper_summary: Existing Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) methods typically adopt an egocentric, step-by-step paradigm, which struggles with error accumulation and limits efficiency. While recent approaches attempt to leverage pre-built environment maps, they often rely on incrementally updating memory graphs or scoring discrete path proposals, which restricts continuous spatial reasoning and creates discrete bottlenecks. We propose Top-Down VLN (TD-VLN), reformulating navigation as a one-step global path planning problem on pre-built top-down maps, supported by our newly constructed R2R-TopDown dataset. To solve this, we introduce NavOne, a unified framework that directly predicts dense path probabilities over multi-modal maps in a single end-to-end forward pass. NavOne features a Top-Down Map Fuser for joint multi-modal map representation, and extends Attention Residuals for spatial-aware depth mixing. Extensive experiments on R2R-TopDown show that NavOne achieves state-of-the-art performance among map-based VLN methods, with a planning-stage speedup of 8x over existing map-based baselines and 80x over egocentric methods, enabling highly efficient global navigation.
2605.06317.paper_summary_zh: 現有的視覺-語言導航（VLN）方法通常採用自我中心的逐步範式，這在錯誤累積方面面臨挑戰，並限制了效率。雖然最近的方法試圖利用預建的環境地圖，但它們通常依賴逐步更新記憶圖或評分離散路徑提案，這限制了連續的空間推理並造成離散瓶頸。我們提出了自上而下的VLN（TD-VLN），將導航重新定義為在預建的自上而下地圖上的一步全局路徑規劃問題，並以我們新構建的R2R-TopDown數據集為支持。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了NavOne，一個統一框架，能夠在單次端到端的前向傳遞中直接預測多模態地圖上的密集路徑概率。NavOne具有一個自上而下的地圖融合器，用於聯合多模態地圖表示，並擴展了空間感知深度混合的注意力殘差。在R2R-TopDown上的大量實驗顯示，NavOne在基於地圖的VLN方法中實現了最先進的性能，規劃階段的速度比現有的基於地圖的基準快8倍，比自我中心的方法快80倍，使得全球導航變得極為高效。
2605.06317.author: Dijia Zhan et.al.
2605.06317.authors: Dijia Zhan, Jinyi Li, Chenxi Zheng, Shaoyu Huang, Yong Li, Jie Tang, Xuemiao Xu
